overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neglected forested area under an overpass, ascending stairs to an elevated pedestrian promenade lined with palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers, ending in a bustling market area with food stalls and vendors.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path littered with trash bags, heading toward a distant staircase

entered.detail: large rusted metal bridge structure spanning overhead with support beams
yellow metal crowd control barriers with blue trash bags piled nearby
scattered blue and white plastic garbage bags along the path edges
dense green foliage and tall trees lining both sides of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a shaded dirt path through dense vegetation beneath a large metal overpass. Blue and white trash bags are scattered along the path sides. The area is sheltered by the overhead bridge structure and tree canopy.

events.description: begins ascending wide concrete stairs from forest path to upper pedestrian level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs toward the upper level promenade

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs while walking down toward the camera

entered.detail: wide gray concrete staircase with multiple steps leading upward
red metal handrails lining both sides of the staircase
tall palm trees visible at the top of the stairs against the sky

segments.scene_description: Ascending a wide concrete staircase with red metal railings. A pedestrian descends the stairs in the opposite direction. The environment transitions from shaded forest to sunlit urban structure with palm trees visible at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian promenade with panoramic city views

events.description: exits stairwell onto sunlit elevated walkway with futuristic city skyline visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated promenade, turning slightly left while admiring the cityscape

entered.detail: black metal safety railing with wooden handrail along the promenade edge
concrete and metal benches lined up along the walkway
tall glass and steel buildings with futuristic architecture and neon accents
large glowing advertisements and holographic displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated promenade with metal railings and benches. Futuristic skyscrapers with massive digital billboards dominate the skyline. Palm trees line the walkway as the camera moves through the sunlit urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor market plaza with food vendors and seating

events.description: enters commercial market area with food stalls, vending machines, and outdoor dining

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area, passing by food stalls and browsing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: standing at a food stall, browsing items for sale

entered.detail: futuristic white kiosk with blue neon lighting and glass display cases
large red vertical banner with 'WAGAMI MARKET' text and logo
red plastic chairs and metal tables arranged for outdoor dining
yellow and black automated vending kiosks against the building wall
large colorful patio umbrella shading a food cart

segments.scene_description: Walking through a bustling market plaza with white food stalls, red outdoor seating, and colorful umbrellas. Vendors and customers populate the area. Large digital advertisements and vending machines line the walls of surrounding buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neglected, shaded underpass into a vibrant, sunlit futuristic cityscape. It begins along a dirt path through dense vegetation and scattered trash bags beneath a massive metal overpass. As the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase with red railings, the shaded forest gives way to a bright urban environment where palm trees first appear. The scene then opens onto an elevated promenade lined with benches and palm trees, with the skyline dominated by towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards. Finally, the walkway leads directly into a bustling market plaza filled with white food stalls, colorful umbrellas, and crowds of people beneath glowing advertisements.
